message:
Running command: # Post-DRT ODB: 206MB (good - larger than step 32's 136MB = routing added)
# Process has read 220MB but write_bytes=0 (still processing in memory)
# 1h+ for 200MB ODB reading + antenna check on 227K cells is plausible
# Let's give it more time

sleep 1800
ps -p 625425 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ANTENNA CHECK DONE"
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/36-openroad-checkantennas-1/openroad-checkantennas-1.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10
echo "---steps---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/ | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -15
tail -10 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
